title: Kavajë, Tirana — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kavajë, Tirana: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kavajë is a city in Tirana with a population of 28,000. A coastal city in western Albania near the Adriatic Sea, known for its beaches, the Bashtovë Fortress, and its agricultural and fishing industries.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
